catalog.name: Daymet Daily Gridded Surface Weather and Climate Variables

dataset.name: Daymet Daily Gridded Surface Weather and Climate Variables

documentation.xlink:title: NCAR GDEX - Daymet Daily Gridded Surface Weather and Climate Variables(d682806)

metadata.documentation: Daymet is a gridded product that provides daily estimates of weather and climate variables. Coverage is on 1 km by 1 km grids separately over North America, Hawaii, and Puerto Rico. Daymet is a product of the Environmental Sciences Division of Oak Ridge National Laboratory, and it is produced by interpolating and extrapolating surface-based observations. A convenience copy of version 4 is hosted in GDEX.
